citations.narrative:
A red fox named Floofala escaped her enclosure in October 2025 when her enclosure fence was damaged. Despite the
facility's best efforts, Floofala was not recovered. Escape from enclosures can result in distress, illness, injury, or death of
the animal. Housing facilities shall be constructed appropriately for the animals involved and be maintained in good repair
to contain the animals. The facility corrected the enclosure prior to this inspection and currently adequately contain the
remaining animals.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
3.125(a)  Critical
   
Facilities, general. 
A red fox named Floofala escaped her enclosure in October 2025 when her enclosure fence was damaged. Despite the 
facility's best efforts, Floofala was not recovered. Escape from enclosures can result in distress, illness, injury, or death of 
the animal. Housing facilities shall be constructed appropriately for the animals involved and be maintained in good repair 
to contain the animals. The facility corrected the enclosure prior to this inspection and currently adequately contain the 
remaining animals. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives. 
 
 n

species.common: RED FOX (INCLUDES SILVER FOX & CROSS FOX)
